blocks.title: Simple Function

blocks.content:
Notice that we define the function once with `function sayHello() { ... }` but call it multiple times with `sayHello()`.

## Function Names

- Use descriptive names
- Start with a verb (what the function does)
- Use camelCase: `calculateTotal`, `printMessage`, `checkAge`

blocks.title: Multiple Functions

blocks.explanation: To call a function, use its name followed by parentheses.

questions.question: Why use functions?
options: To reuse code without writing it again
To make code organize and easier to read
questions.explanation: Functions help you avoid repetition and keep your code organized and maintainable.
